create.titlePlaceholder: I want to take a coffee
create.limitSub: You can run one hangout at a time. Head to “{{title}}”, or delete it to start a new one.
create.geoHint: 📍 Turn on location to see who’s around right now — and let nearby people catch your Hi 👀🔥
create.geoRequired: A Hi now tells people where to find you — enable location to continue.

deleteConfirm: Delete this hangout? This ends it for everyone and cannot be undone.
deleteFailedAlert: Could not delete. Please try again.

gated.title: Members-only hangout
gated.pending: Request pending - you'll be able to join the conversation once a member accepts.
gated.prompt: Request to join to see the conversation and chat.

feed.emptySub: Be the first to jump in

errors.locFailed: Couldn't get your location. Please enable location access and try again.
errors.imageType: Please select a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.imageSend: Couldn't send image. Please try again.
